subcodes.first_line: The Book hath ascended unto the Throne, and hath sent down the Book as a command from His presence, and it is verily the Book, the Tablet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان الکتاب استوی علی العرش و انزل الکتاب امرا من عنده و هو الکتاب ان اللوح
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to the people of the world, @thankfulness; gratitude, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @call to action, @chastisement and requital
